home.name: Carlos Araujo Galván
home.profileImageAlt: Profile picture of Carlos Araujo Galván

about.lead: Full Stack Web Developer & UX/UI Designer with +2 years of experience building modern, scalable web applications focused on improving the user experience.
about.frontend: For the Frontend and user experience design (UX/UI), I start by prototyping interfaces in Figma and build them with Angular or React (TypeScript), giving them their final style with Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap or native CSS. I take care of every detail so they are fast, accessible and adapt smoothly to any device.
about.backend: For the Backend I develop APIs and server-side logic with Node.js, Java (Spring Boot) or PHP (Laravel/Symfony), integrating relational (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and non-relational (MongoDB) databases to build complete end-to-end solutions.
about.philosophy: I uphold and apply clean code and best practices (SOLID, Clean Architecture), always working in agile environments with CI/CD workflows on Git/GitLab or GitHub and committing to continuous improvement and quality in every project.
